ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financing_requests" (
  "financing_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financing request */,
  "cic_number" INTEGER /* CIC number assigned to the request */,
  "dossier_number" INTEGER /* Dossier number linked to the request */,
  "bot_account" TEXT /* Account identifier for processing */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., Approved, Reassigned) */,
  "request_channel" INTEGER /* Channel through which the request was submitted */,
  "military_status" INTEGER /* Military status of the applicant */,
  "yakeen_status" INTEGER /* Yakeen compliance status */,
  "kyc_status" INTEGER /* KYC compliance status */,
  "financing_request_amount" REAL /* Requested financing amount */,
  "available_credit_limit" TEXT /* Current available credit limit */,
  "executed_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the request was executed */,
  "time_per_record" INTEGER /* Time taken per record in minutes */,
  "gross_salary" REAL /* Gross salary of the applicant */,
  "remark" TEXT /* Additional remarks about the financing request */,
  "stage_time" INTEGER /* Stage time in minutes for the processing stage */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the request was submitted */,
  "request_deadline" TEXT /* Date and time by which the request should be processed */,
  "requestor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the request */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the request is not approved */,
  "final_decision_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the final decision was made */,
  "document_ids" TEXT /* JSON array of document IDs associated with the request */,
  "processing_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the entire processing in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financing_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financing_requests_military_status FOREIGN KEY ("military_status") REFERENCES military_status ("military_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financing_requests_yakeen_status FOREIGN KEY ("yakeen_status") REFERENCES yakeen_status ("yakeen_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financing_requests_request_channel FOREIGN KEY ("request_channel") REFERENCES request_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financing_requests_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financing_requests_kyc_status FOREIGN KEY ("kyc_status") REFERENCES kyc_status ("kyc_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financing_requests_requestor_id FOREIGN KEY ("requestor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, admin, staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel (e.g., Online, In-Person) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "channel_contacts" TEXT /* JSON array of contact information for the channel */,
  "channel_url" TEXT /* URL for online channels */,
  "channel_location" TEXT /* Physical location for in-person channels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change record */,
  "financing_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financing request this change pertains to */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status before the change */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status after the change */,
  "changed_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the status change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_history_financing_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("financing_request_id") REFERENCES financing_requests ("financing_request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "military_status" (
  "military_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each military status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the military status (e.g., Active, Veteran) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the military status */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* JSON array of benefits associated with the military status */,
  "discounts" TEXT /* JSON array of discounts available for the military status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("military_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yakeen_status" (
  "yakeen_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Yakeen status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the Yakeen status (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Yakeen status */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the Yakeen check was performed */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the Yakeen check */,
  "check_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing details of the Yakeen check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yakeen_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kyc_status" (
  "kyc_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KYC status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the KYC status (e.g., Verified, Unverified) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the KYC status */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the KYC check was performed */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the KYC check */,
  "check_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing details of the KYC check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kyc_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_limits" (
  "credit_limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit limit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the credit limit */,
  "available_credit_limit" REAL /* Available credit limit for the user */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit limit was set or changed */,
  "limit_type" TEXT /* Type of credit limit (e.g., revolving, installment) */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date when the next credit limit review is scheduled */,
  "review_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the next credit limit review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_limits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remarks" (
  "remark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remark */,
  "financing_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financing request associated with the remark */,
  "remark_text" TEXT /* Text of the remark */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the remark was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the remark */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the remark is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remarks_financing_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("financing_request_id") REFERENCES financing_requests ("financing_request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "financing_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financing request linked to the audit log */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was recorded */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing details of the action taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_financing_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("financing_request_id") REFERENCES financing_requests ("financing_request_id")
)
